name_en: 5BB117: New Miu Miu briefcase, featuring trendy new velvet leather adopted by major brands this year, hot across the internet, canvas lining. This bag is cool, capturing an exquisite multifunctional design, casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Extra-large capacity and lightweight, simple yet not simplistic. Major fashion bloggers almost all have one. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)
